title: senecio brevior
intro: Senecio brevior, also known as short-fruited ragwort, is a plant species belonging to the daisy family that is native to Europe and parts of Asia. The plant is used for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate the digestive system and relieve symptoms of indigestion. In terms of health benefits, the plant has been traditionally used to treat conditions such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as being used as an antispasmodic and diuretic. Herbal preparations of Senecio brevior include teas and infusions, and it can also be found in some commercial herbal supplements, although it's essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it due to potential toxicity.
